title: Remote Repository
description: Mengelola remote repository dan sinkronisasi perubahan dengan fetch, pull, push.

commands.name: git remote
commands.title: Mengelola Remote
commands.description: Menampilkan, menambah, atau menghapus remote repository.
commands.examples:
git remote
git remote -v
git remote add origin https://github.com/user/repo.git
git remote add upstream https://github.com/original/repo.git
git remote remove origin
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:user/repo.git

commands.name: git fetch
commands.title: Mengunduh Perubahan dari Remote
commands.description: Mengunduh data baru dari remote tanpa menggabungkan ke working directory.

options.description: Hapus referensi branch remote yang sudah dihapus

commands.examples:
git fetch
git fetch origin
git fetch --all
git fetch --prune
git fetch origin main
commands.notes: Fetch aman — tidak mengubah working directory. Review dulu sebelum merge.

commands.name: git pull
commands.title: Fetch + Merge dari Remote
commands.description: Mengunduh dan langsung menggabungkan perubahan dari remote.
commands.examples:
git pull
git pull origin main
git pull --rebase origin main
git pull --ff-only
commands.notes: git pull --rebase membuat history lebih bersih dibanding merge biasa.

commands.name: git push
commands.title: Mengirim Perubahan ke Remote
commands.description: Mengunggah commit lokal ke remote repository.
commands.examples:
git push
git push origin main
git push -u origin feature/login
git push --force-with-lease origin feature/login
git push origin --delete old-branch
git push --tags
commands.warning: git push --force bisa menghapus commit orang lain! Selalu gunakan --force-with-lease.
